passives.name: Supremacy
passives.effects: Increase your '''total''' {{as|attack damage}}, {{as|ability power}}, {{as|attack speed}}, {{as|'''maximum''' health}}, {{as|armor}}, {{as|magic resistance}}, and {{as|ability haste}} by 26%, further increased by {{fd|1.2}}% for each round you win and reduced by 3% for each round you lose.

effects_structured.raw: Increase your '''total''' {{as attack damage}}, {{as ability power}}, {{as attack speed}}, {{as '''maximum''' health}}, {{as armor}}, {{as magic resistance}}, and {{as ability haste}} by 26%, further increased by {{fd 1.2}}% for each round you win and reduced by 3% for each round you lose.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model: this passive is always-on during Arena combat and scales the full listed stat package together, not independently by stat category.
Round-based scaling updates between rounds based on outcome (+1.2% per round win, -3% per round loss); in-combat stat contribution remains continuous once the round starts.
Patch-history verification confirms the lower per-win growth rate now used in this file.
